chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza C.P. No. D – 4883 of 2025 [Muhamad Uzair and others v. POS & others] Petitioners: Muhammad Uzair son of Ghulam Haider and two others through Mr. Usman Farooq, Advocate. Respondents 1&4: Nemo. Respondents 2-3: Dawood University of Engineering & Technology through Dr. Saddam Ali Khichi, Director Student Affairs, who is present in Court. Date of hearing: 22-12-2025 Date of decision: 22-12-2025 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. – Counsel for the Petitioners and Dr. Saddam Ali Khichi, Director Students Affairs, Dawood University of Engineering and Technology, Karachi, pray that the petition be disposed of in terms of order dated 28-03-2025 passed in C.P. No. D – 985/2025 (Page-53). Therefore, the petition is disposed of as follows: If the Petitioners/students execute a fresh bond that in future they will not indulge in any political activity, or create any law-and-order situation in the University, or participate in any political demonstration or raise any political slogan against the University, they would remove the penalty against the Petitioners/students and would allow them registration in examination. Counsel for Petitioners undertake to execute such bond within seven days. Subject to execution of such bond by the Petitioners/students, the University / Chairman Syndicate is directed to open the portal for the Petitioners /students for registration in the exams starting from 12th January, 2026 and would further allow them to attend their classes in future. JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
